pi_items.source: URL verification via curl and PIL image inspection
Downloaded Unsplash image via Python PIL
curl HTTP header check on fallback URL

pi_items.verified_value: Generates synthetic image via ImageMagick convert command if downloads fail

privileged_info_summary: The rotate_90_ccw task uses a real Unsplash image (800x553 pixels JPEG in RGB mode) as the primary test image, downloaded from a valid HTTP 200 endpoint. The fallback mechanism attempts a non-functional URL (returns 404) before falling back to synthetic image generation using ImageMagick. The task verifies rotation by comparing SSIM scores using scikit-image, requiring an SSIM score of 0.95+ for the counter-clockwise rotation direction to pass.
